item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡航运几乎完全停滞，JMIC称
item.description: 霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通几乎完全停滞，中东冲突正扰乱这条全球关键通道——从石油到化肥等大宗商品的运输命脉。【原文：Ship traffic in the Strait of Hormuz has ground to a near-complete halt as the Middle East conflict disrupts the key global artery for commodities from oil to fertilizers.】

item.title: 瑞士选民即将把现金写入宪法
item.description: 瑞士人可能即将通过一项投票，再次确认他们对现金的喜爱——这项投票将使他们钱包里的法郎在宪法中获得一席之地。【原文：The Swiss may be about to reaffirm their fondness for cash with a vote that would give the francs in their wallets a place in the constitution.】

item.title: 全球资金以四年最快速度撤离亚洲
item.description: 随着伊朗局势升级引发全球市场风险再评估，海外投资者正以近四年最快速度撤离亚洲新兴市场股票。【原文：Overseas investors are pulling money out of emerging Asian stocks at the fastest pace in nearly four years as the escalating conflict in Iran triggers a reassessment of risk across global markets.】

item.title: 新兴市场货币与股市或迎疫情以来最糟糕一周
item.description: 新兴市场股票和货币正面临自2020年疫情高峰以来最大的单周跌幅。【原文：Emerging-market equities and currencies are set for the biggest weekly decline since the height of the pandemic in 2020.】

item.title: 土耳其斥资120亿美元抵御战火引发的里拉动荡
item.description: 土耳其为维持里拉汇率稳定，在伊朗战争引发全球市场动荡的一周内耗资120亿美元，相当于其外汇储备的约15%。【原文：Turkey has spent $12 billion, equal to roughly 15% of its foreign-currency reserves, to keep the lira stable during a week of global market volatility triggered by the war in Iran.】

item.title: 卡塔尔提议租赁液化天然气运输船，因主要出口工厂持续停运
item.description: 卡塔尔正提供至少两艘其控制的液化天然气运输船进行租赁，因该国位于波斯湾的庞大出口设施因中东持续战事而持续关闭。【原文：Qatar is offering at least two liquefied natural gas tankers that it controls for lease, as the country’s massive export facility in the Persian Gulf remains shut due to the ongoing war in the Middle East.】

item.title: 国际货币基金组织准备援助受中东石油冲击影响的经济体
item.description: 国际货币基金组织表示，在中东冲突加剧不确定性的背景下，该组织随时准备协助面临国际收支问题的国家。【原文：The International Monetary Fund said it stands ready to assist countries facing balance of payment concerns amid heightened uncertainty from the Middle East conflict.】

item.title: 数百万桶俄罗斯石油已运抵印度近海
item.description: 超过1500万桶俄罗斯石油正漂浮在印度近海，为该国缓解中东供应短缺提供了快速解决方案。此前美国颁发了临时许可证，允许印度购买这些石油。【原文：More than 15 million barrels of Russian oil are floating within easy reach of India, offering the nation a quick fix to Middle East supply shortages after the US issued a temporary license allowing purchases.】

item.title: 软银寻求最高400亿美元创纪录贷款以收购OpenAI股权
item.description: 知情人士透露，软银集团正寻求最高400亿美元的贷款，主要用于资助其对美国科技巨头OpenAI的投资。这将是该公司有史以来规模最大的纯美元计价借款。【原文：SoftBank Group Corp. is seeking a loan of as much as $40 billion to mostly help finance its investment in US tech giant OpenAI, according to people familiar with the matter, in what would be its largest-ever borrowing denominated solely in dollars.】

item.title: 菲律宾央行警告油价若达100美元可能触发加息
item.description: 菲律宾中央银行行长埃利·雷莫洛纳表示，油价若突破每桶100美元，可能迫使货币政策收紧，因通胀率或将突破央行设定的目标区间。【原文：Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas Governor Eli Remolona Jr. said oil reaching $100 per barrel could force monetary policy tightening as inflation could breach the central bank’s target range.】

item.title: 中国人民银行顾问警告：中国消费转型任重道远
item.description: 据央行顾问称，中国将经济重心转向消费支出的努力将需要较长时间，尽管北京方面已采取更宽松的增长目标，以表明其更注重调整经济增长动力。【原文：China’s effort to pivot its economy toward consumer spending will take a long time, according to a central bank adviser, even as Beijing adopts a softer growth target to signal a greater focus on rebalancing its growth drivers.】

item.title: 中国五年计划在太阳能领域低调行事，此前该领域曾经历快速扩张
item.description: 中国在最新五年规划中未为太阳能设定雄心勃勃的目标，凸显出该行业在多年爆发式增长后面临日益严峻的挑战。【原文：China has refrained from setting ambitious goals for solar energy in its latest five-year plan, highlighting the sector’s mounting challenges after years of explosive growth.】

item.title: 马来西亚因中东风险暂缓上调经济增长预期
item.description: 马来西亚第二任财政部长表示，由于中东冲突的不确定性笼罩着该国经济前景，政策制定者将暂缓上调2026年经济增长预期。【原文：Malaysia’s second finance minister said policymakers will hold off on raising the country’s 2026 growth forecast as uncertainty over the Middle East conflict clouds the country’s economic outlook.】

item.title: 经济学家上调香港2026年经济增长预期，因预算支持
item.description: 根据彭博社3月2日至5日进行的调查，香港今年经济增长预计将高于此前预测，主要得益于金融活动改善以及政府在2月25日公布的财政预算案中推出的扩张性措施。【原文：Hong Kong’s economic growth for this year is expected to be higher than previously forecast, supported by improving financial activity and expansionary measures in the government’s Feb. 25 budget, according to the median estimate in a Bloomberg survey conducted March 2-5.】

item.title: 亚洲垃圾债表现逊于同类债券，因战争凸显石油依赖性
item.description: 亚洲高收益美元债券正遭受远超全球同类债券的冲击，因伊朗冲突升级凸显该地区对进口能源的依赖，与美国形成鲜明对比。【原文：Asian high-yield dollar bonds are getting disproportionately hit compared with global peers as the escalating Iran conflict underscores the region’s reliance on imported energy, in sharp contrast with the US.】

item.title: 罗姆股价或因电装80亿美元收购传闻大幅上涨
item.description: 罗姆公司股价周五在东京股市交易中将涨停，此前《日经新闻》报道电装公司已提出收购要约，对这家芯片制造商的估值约为1.3万亿日元（83亿美元）。【原文：Rohm Co. shares are set to surge by their daily limit in Tokyo trading Friday after Nikkei reported Denso Corp. has made a takeover approach valuing the chipmaker at around ¥1.3 trillion ($8.3 billion).】

item.title: TA Associates据称正考虑出售珍珠奶茶品牌贡茶
item.description: 知情人士透露，TA Associates正考虑出售珍珠奶茶品牌贡茶。【原文：TA Associates is considering selling bubble-tea maker Gong cha, according to people with knowledge of the matter.】

item.title: 泰克公司2026年将对韩国锌公司征收更高银、锗矿石费用
item.description: 加拿大矿业公司泰克资源与韩国锌业公司达成协议，2026年起将以略高的加工费出售锌精矿，同时因银和锗价格飙升，对这两种金属收取更高费用。【原文：Canadian miner Teck Resources agreed with Korea Zinc Co. to sell its zinc concentrates at a slightly higher processing fee in 2026, while charging more on silver and germanium after a surge in prices for both metals.】

item.title: 铝价创2024年以来最大单周涨幅，伊朗危机推升市场
item.description: 随着中东地区冲突加剧导致该地区铝材运输受阻，实物市场剧烈震荡，铝价有望创下自2024年9月以来的最大单周涨幅。【原文：Aluminum was set to post its biggest weekly gain since September 2024 as the deepening conflict in the Middle East snarled shipments from the region and upended physical markets.】

item.title: KKR斥资2.35亿美元收购SK Eternix股权，伊朗战争搅动市场
item.description: KKR公司将斥资3480亿韩元（约合2.35亿美元）收购韩国可再生能源企业SK Eternix的部分股权，此举既彰显其在气候与环境领域的投资力度，也表明其在伊朗战争引发的市场波动中仍保持强劲的并购意愿。【原文：KKR & Co. will acquire a 348 billion won ($235 million) stake in South Korean renewable energy firm SK Eternix Co., stepping up its climate and environmental investments and underscoring its appetite for dealmaking despite market volatility stemming from the Iran war.】

item.title: 摩根士丹利下调评级对印度股市造成新一轮打击
item.description: 在中东冲突期间，外国投资者纷纷抛售股票。【原文：Foreigners have rushed to sell shares amid the Middle East conflict.】

item.title: 若中东战争持续，碳信用需求或将攀升
item.description: 若液化天然气供应持续中断迫使工业转向更廉价但排放量更高的燃料，中东地区长期战争可能推高合规市场对碳信用额的需求。【原文：A protracted war in the Middle East could lift demand for carbon credits in the compliance market, if ongoing disruptions to LNG supplies compel industries to turn to cheaper, higher-emission fuels.】

item.title: 油价飙升令亚洲发展中国家降息预期破灭
item.description: 随着交易员加码押注伊朗战争引发的石油冲击，亚洲发展中国家的央行正面临政策前景的突然转变，这加剧了在最新危机之前就已不断累积的通胀压力。【原文：Central banks across developing Asia are facing a sudden shift in their policy outlook as traders ramp up bets on an Iran war-driven oil shock, adding to inflation pressures that were already building before the latest crisis.】

item.title: 摩根士丹利对亚洲股市转为谨慎，下调印度评级
item.description: 摩根士丹利对亚洲股市采取更谨慎的立场，削减了印度股票的配置，因担忧若霍尔木兹海峡的石油运输未能恢复，伊朗战争可能扰乱供应链。【原文：Morgan Stanley is adopting a more cautious stance on Asian equities, trimming its India exposure on concerns that the Iran war may disrupt supply chains if oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz fail to recover.】

item.title: 国泰航空、东方海外航运应对中东动荡局势
item.description: 国泰航空有限公司与东方海外国际有限公司的财报电话会议将成为下周投资者关注焦点，因美伊紧张局势升级恐将扰乱区域运营。【原文：Earnings calls from Cathay Pacific Airways Ltd. and Orient Overseas International Ltd. are investor highlights next week as escalating US-Iran tensions threaten to upend regional operations.】

item.title: 越南贸易逆差收窄，尽管出口未达预期
item.description: 越南2月份贸易逆差有所收窄，但进出口增速均低于预期，同时受假期影响，当月消费价格出现大幅上涨。【原文：Vietnam’s trade deficit narrowed in February, while exports and imports both grew less than expected and consumer prices spiked in a holiday-affected month.】

item.title: 遭制裁的俄罗斯液化天然气运输船在袭击后避开地中海航线
item.description: 美国制裁的俄罗斯液化天然气运输船正绕开地中海航线，此前一艘该类船只据称遭到乌克兰无人机船只袭击。【原文：US-sanctioned Russian liquefied natural gas vessels are redirecting away from the Mediterranean Sea after one was allegedly attacked by Ukrainian drone boats.】

item.title: 北京食品调查后，寿司郎母公司股价下跌
item.description: 寿司连锁品牌Food & Life Companies Ltd.股价创下三个多月来最大跌幅，此前中国监管部门因涉嫌食品污染问题对该品牌位于北京的一家Sushiro分店展开检查。【原文：Conveyor-belt sushi chain operator Food & Life Companies Ltd. fell the most in more than three months after Chinese authorities inspected one of its Sushiro outlets in Beijing over suspected food contamination.】

item.title: 外资银行发现印度增长伴随严格条件
item.description: 全球银行纷纷涌向印度近4万亿美元的经济体，却发现进入市场需付出代价：控制权受限、回报周期漫长，且需要采用非常规的交易结构。【原文：Global banks attracted to India’s nearly $4 trillion economy are discovering that access comes at a price: limited control, drawn-out returns and the need for unconventional deal structures.】

item.title: 菲律宾考虑缩短工作周、减少空调使用以节约能源
item.description: 随着中东局势紧张推高全球燃料成本，菲律宾正寻求节能之道。政府建议民众减少使用空调，并避免非必要的出行。【原文：The Philippines is looking at ways to save on energy as tensions in the Middle East push global fuel costs higher, with the government suggesting people use their air conditioners less and shy away from non-essential travel.】
